_note: Signature lines are single products with one image each in images/churro-products/<line>/. Extras (dips, shakes, coffee) render as simple lists.

categories.name: Crispy Manía
categories.description: Our signature churro. Crispy fresh, fried to order, and dusted in cinnamon sugar. The one we opened with in 1997.

items.name: Crispy Manía
items.description: Crispy fresh, fried to order, dusted in cinnamon sugar.

categories.name: Twist Manía
categories.description: A long twist with the filling running end to end. Dulce de leche, chocolate, and more, sealed inside a fresh-fried churro.

items.name: Twist Manía
items.description: Filled twist, fried fresh, dusted in cinnamon sugar.

categories.name: Churro Bites
categories.description: Bite-size churros by the cup. Warm, cinnamon sugar, built for dipping. The road-trip order.

items.name: Churro Bites
items.description: Bite-size churros by the cup, made for dipping.

categories.name: Big Manía
categories.description: An oversized churro made for the table. A little bit of that world-record energy, with two dips on the side.

items.name: Big Manía
items.description: An oversized churro built to share, with two dips.

items.name: Dulce de Leche
items.description: Thick, slow, classic. The house dip.

items.name: Chocolate
items.description: Warm melted chocolate for serious dunking.

items.name: Cream Cheese
items.description: Sweet cream cheese, a quiet favorite.

items.name: Hazelnut
items.description: Hazelnut chocolate spread, warmed for dipping.

categories.name: Shakes & Drinks
categories.description: Cold, thick, and made to go with a churro.

items.name: Chocolate Shake
items.description: Deep chocolate shake, churro on the side.

items.name: Espresso
items.description: A short, strong shot to balance the sugar.

items.name: Iced Latte
items.description: Cold milk, smooth espresso, over ice.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.description: Espresso and steamed milk, dusted with cinnamon.

items.name: Cortado
items.description: Equal parts espresso and warm milk.
